name: gochess-board-tests
description: Unit tests for GoChess Board variant logic

scripts.test: mocha --require test-setup.js variant-tests.js history-tests.js chessboard-tests.js navigation-tests.js codemirror-integration-tests.js variant-window-tests.js
scripts.test:watch: mocha --require test-setup.js variant-tests.js history-tests.js chessboard-tests.js navigation-tests.js codemirror-integration-tests.js variant-window-tests.js --watch
